constraints: Do not implement outside tasks-mux package and directly related docs unless runtime tracing proves the path is required.
Preserve compatibility with existing breakpoint JSON and existing CLI/MCP consumers.
Use runtime-read spec blocks from GitHub issues and docs for acceptance prompts.
Use shell tasks for deterministic quality gates.
Keep breakpoints sparse; no user breakpoint is needed unless the spec is contradictory or a backend cannot support a required operation.
contractVerificationCommand: npm run typecheck --workspace=@a5c-ai/tasks-mux && npm run test --workspace=@a5c-ai/tasks-mux -- --run packages/tasks-mux/src/__tests__/shared-types-backend-interface.test.ts
surfaceVerificationCommand: npm run test --workspace=@a5c-ai/tasks-mux -- --run packages/tasks-mux/src/__tests__/cli-program.test.ts packages/tasks-mux/src/__tests__/cli-output.test.ts packages/tasks-mux/src/__tests__/mcp-server.test.ts packages/tasks-mux/src/__tests__/mcp-http-transport.test.ts && npm run test:packaged-surface-parity --workspace=@a5c-ai/tasks-mux
